author: mark
text:
Pin uppercase-hex acceptance in validate_id

The audit claim that validate_id rejected uppercase hex was wrong —
is_ascii_hexdigit has always accepted [0-9a-fA-F]. This pins the
behavior with a test and fixes the doc comment. The bl- prefix
stays case-strict because mixing bl- and BL- in one repo would
fragment filenames worse than a hard-error.
